meta.description: توثيق شامل لمكتبة Vulkan باللغة العربية - الدوال والأمثلة

items.name: vkAcquireNextImageKHR
items.description: يكتسب فهرس الصورة التالية المتاحة من سلسلة التبديل للعرض عليها.
items.signature: VkResult vkAcquireNextImageKHR(VkDevice device, VkSwapchainKHR swapchain, uint64_t timeout, VkSemaphore semaphore, VkFence fence, uint32_t* pImageIndex)

parameters.name: pImageIndex
parameters.description: مؤشر إلى متغير سيحفظ فهرس الصورة

returnValues.description: تم الحصول على فهرس الصورة بنجاح
انتهت المهلة قبل الحصول على صورة
سلسلة التبديل أصبحت دون المستوى المثالي

items.name: vkAllocateCommandBuffers
items.signature: VkResult vkAllocateCommandBuffers(VkDevice device, const VkCommandBufferAllocateInfo* pAllocateInfo, VkCommandBuffer* pCommandBuffers)

items.name: vkAllocateDescriptorSets
items.signature: VkResult vkAllocateDescriptorSets(VkDevice device, const VkDescriptorSetAllocateInfo* pAllocateInfo, VkDescriptorSet* pDescriptorSets)

items.name: vkAllocateMemory
items.signature: VkResult vkAllocateMemory(VkDevice device, const VkMemoryAllocateInfo* pAllocateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkDeviceMemory* pMemory)

items.name: vkBeginCommandBuffer
items.description: يبدأ تسجيل الأوامر في مخزن الأوامر.
items.signature: VkResult vkBeginCommandBuffer(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, const VkCommandBufferBeginInfo* pBeginInfo)

items.name: vkBindBufferMemory
items.signature: VkResult vkBindBufferMemory(VkDevice device, VkBuffer buffer, VkDeviceMemory memory, VkDeviceSize memoryOffset)

items.name: vkBindImageMemory
items.signature: VkResult vkBindImageMemory(VkDevice device, VkImage image, VkDeviceMemory memory, VkDeviceSize memoryOffset)

items.name: vkCmdBeginRenderPass
items.signature: void vkCmdBeginRenderPass(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, const VkRenderPassBeginInfo* pRenderPassBegin, VkSubpassContents contents)

items.name: vkCmdBindPipeline
items.description: يربط خط أنابيب الرسم أو الحساب.
items.signature: void vkCmdBindPipeline(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, VkPipelineBindPoint pipelineBindPoint, VkPipeline pipeline)

items.name: vkCmdBindVertexBuffers
items.signature: void vkCmdBindVertexBuffers(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, uint32_t firstBinding, uint32_t bindingCount, const VkBuffer* pBuffers, const VkDeviceSize* pOffsets)

items.name: vkCmdBindIndexBuffer
items.signature: void vkCmdBindIndexBuffer(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, VkBuffer buffer, VkDeviceSize offset, VkIndexType indexType)

items.name: vkCmdDraw
items.signature: void vkCmdDraw(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, uint32_t vertexCount, uint32_t instanceCount, uint32_t firstVertex, uint32_t firstInstance)

items.name: vkCmdDrawIndexed
items.description: يرسم مجموعة من الرؤوس باستخدام الفهارس.
items.signature: void vkCmdDrawIndexed(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, uint32_t indexCount, uint32_t instanceCount, uint32_t firstIndex, int32_t vertexOffset, uint32_t firstInstance)

items.name: vkCmdCopyBuffer
items.signature: void vkCmdCopyBuffer(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, VkBuffer srcBuffer, VkBuffer dstBuffer, uint32_t regionCount, const VkBufferCopy* pRegions)

items.name: vkCmdCopyImage
items.signature: void vkCmdCopyImage(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, VkImage srcImage, VkImageLayout srcImageLayout, VkImage dstImage, VkImageLayout dstImageLayout, uint32_t regionCount, const VkImageCopy* pRegions)

items.name: vkCmdPipelineBarrier
items.description: ينشئ حاجزاً بين مراحلة خط الأنابيب.
items.signature: void vkCmdPipelineBarrier(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, VkPipelineStageFlags srcStageMask, VkPipelineStageFlags dstStageMask, VkDependencyFlags dependencyFlags, uint32_t memoryBarrierCount, const VkMemoryBarrier* pMemoryBarriers, uint32_t bufferMemoryBarrierCount, const VkBufferMemoryBarrier* pBufferMemoryBarriers, uint32_t imageMemoryBarrierCount, const VkImageMemoryBarrier* pImageMemoryBarriers)

items.name: vkCmdDispatch
items.signature: void vkCmdDispatch(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer, uint32_t groupCountX, uint32_t groupCountY, uint32_t groupCountZ)

items.name: vkCreateInstance
items.description: ينشئ كائن المثيل الذي يمثل اتصال التطبيق بمكتبة Vulkan.
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateInstance(const VkInstanceCreateInfo* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkInstance* pInstance)

items.name: vkCreateDevice
items.description: ينشئ جهازاً منطقياً للتفاعل مع الجهاز الفيزيائي.
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateDevice(VkPhysicalDevice physicalDevice, const VkDeviceCreateInfo* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkDevice* pDevice)

items.name: vkCreateSwapchainKHR
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateSwapchainKHR(VkDevice device, const VkSwapchainCreateInfoKHR* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkSwapchainKHR* pSwapchain)

items.name: vkCreateGraphicsPipelines
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateGraphicsPipelines(VkDevice device, VkPipelineCache pipelineCache, uint32_t createInfoCount, const VkGraphicsPipelineCreateInfo* pCreateInfos, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkPipeline* pPipelines)

items.name: vkCreateShaderModule
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateShaderModule(VkDevice device, const VkShaderModuleCreateInfo* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkShaderModule* pShaderModule)

items.name: vkCreateRenderPass
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateRenderPass(VkDevice device, const VkRenderPassCreateInfo* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkRenderPass* pRenderPass)

items.name: vkCreateFramebuffer
items.signature: VkResult vkCreateFramebuffer(VkDevice device, const VkFramebufferCreateInfo* pCreateInfo, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator, VkFramebuffer* pFramebuffer)

items.name: vkDestroyInstance
items.signature: void vkDestroyInstance(VkInstance instance, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير المثيل
vkDestroyInstance(instance, nullptr);

items.name: vkDestroyDevice
items.signature: void vkDestroyDevice(VkDevice device, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير الجهاز
vkDestroyDevice(device, nullptr);

items.name: vkDestroySwapchainKHR
items.signature: void vkDestroySwapchainKHR(VkDevice device, VkSwapchainKHR swapchain, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير سلسلة التبديل
vkDestroySwapchainKHR(device, swapchain, nullptr);

items.name: vkDestroyPipeline
items.signature: void vkDestroyPipeline(VkDevice device, VkPipeline pipeline, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير خط الأنابيب
vkDestroyPipeline(device, graphicsPipeline, nullptr);

items.name: vkDestroyShaderModule
items.signature: void vkDestroyShaderModule(VkDevice device, VkShaderModule shaderModule, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)

items.name: vkDestroySemaphore
items.signature: void vkDestroySemaphore(VkDevice device, VkSemaphore semaphore, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير الإشارة
vkDestroySemaphore(device, semaphore, nullptr);

items.name: vkDestroyFence
items.signature: void vkDestroyFence(VkDevice device, VkFence fence, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تدمير السياج
vkDestroyFence(device, fence, nullptr);

items.name: vkDeviceWaitIdle
items.description: ينتظر حتى يكتمل جميع العمليات على الجهاز.
items.signature: VkResult vkDeviceWaitIdle(VkDevice device)
items.example:
// انتظار اكتمال جميع العمليات
vkDeviceWaitIdle(device);

items.name: vkEndCommandBuffer
items.description: ينهي تسجيل الأوامر في مخزن الأوامر.
items.signature: VkResult vkEndCommandBuffer(VkCommandBuffer commandBuffer)

items.name: vkEnumeratePhysicalDevices
items.signature: VkResult vkEnumeratePhysicalDevices(VkInstance instance, uint32_t* pPhysicalDeviceCount, VkPhysicalDevice* pPhysicalDevices)

items.name: vkFreeMemory
items.signature: void vkFreeMemory(VkDevice device, VkDeviceMemory memory, const VkAllocationCallbacks* pAllocator)
items.example:
// تحرير الذاكرة
vkFreeMemory(device, memory, nullptr);

items.name: vkFreeCommandBuffers
items.signature: void vkFreeCommandBuffers(VkDevice device, VkCommandPool commandPool, uint32_t commandBufferCount, const VkCommandBuffer* pCommandBuffers)
items.example:
// تحرير مخازن الأوامر
vkFreeCommandBuffers(device, commandPool, 1, &commandBuffer);

items.name: vkFlushMappedMemoryRanges
items.signature: VkResult vkFlushMappedMemoryRanges(VkDevice device, uint32_t memoryRangeCount, const VkMappedMemoryRange* pMemoryRanges)

items.name: vkGetDeviceQueue
items.signature: void vkGetDeviceQueue(VkDevice device, uint32_t queueFamilyIndex, uint32_t queueIndex, VkQueue* pQueue)
items.example:
// الحصول على طابور الرسم
vkGetDeviceQueue(device, queueFamilyIndex, 0, &graphicsQueue);

items.name: vkGetPhysicalDeviceProperties
items.signature: void vkGetPhysicalDeviceProperties(VkPhysicalDevice physicalDevice, VkPhysicalDeviceProperties* pProperties)

items.name: vkGetPhysicalDeviceQueueFamilyProperties
items.signature: void vkGetPhysicalDeviceQueueFamilyProperties(VkPhysicalDevice physicalDevice, uint32_t* pQueueFamilyPropertyCount, VkQueueFamilyProperties* pQueueFamilyProperties)

items.name: vkMapMemory
items.signature: VkResult vkMapMemory(VkDevice device, VkDeviceMemory memory, VkDeviceSize offset, VkDeviceSize size, VkMemoryMapFlags flags, void** ppData)

items.name: vkUnmapMemory
items.signature: void vkUnmapMemory(VkDevice device, VkDeviceMemory memory)
items.example:
// إلغاء تخطيط الذاكرة
vkUnmapMemory(device, memory);

items.name: vkQueueSubmit
items.signature: VkResult vkQueueSubmit(VkQueue queue, uint32_t submitCount, const VkSubmitInfo* pSubmits, VkFence fence)

items.name: vkQueuePresentKHR
items.signature: VkResult vkQueuePresentKHR(VkQueue queue, const VkPresentInfoKHR* pPresentInfo)

items.name: vkQueueWaitIdle
items.description: ينتظر حتى يكتمل جميع العمليات في الطابور.
items.signature: VkResult vkQueueWaitIdle(VkQueue queue)
items.example:
// انتظار اكتمال الطابور
vkQueueWaitIdle(graphicsQueue);

items.name: vkWaitForFences
items.signature: VkResult vkWaitForFences(VkDevice device, uint32_t fenceCount, const VkFences* pFences, VkBool32 waitAll, uint64_t timeout)

items.name: vkResetFences
items.signature: void vkResetFences(VkDevice device, uint32_t fenceCount, const VkFence* pFences)
items.example:
// إعادة تعيين السياج
vkResetFences(device, 1, &inFlightFence);
